# docs(cloud-deployment): accuracy pass — Security / TenantIngestionModel / Configuration vs shipped

Part of #14310 · follow the content rubric pinned on #14310. Refs #14310.

**Problem:** cloud-deploy accuracy may drift from shipped reality (bearer / PAT auth + per-user/tenant model; unified Chroma; local-or-remote models). V-B-A against `ai/deploy/` + ADR-0014, then freshen.

**Acceptance Criteria**
- [ ] Tenant identity + visibility + auth described per shipped reality (bearer-PAT + OIDC options); unified Chroma + local/remote models reflected.
- [ ] Tenant-isolation invariants accurate; generic capability terms only (no client specifics — `learn/` is public).

**Files:** `learn/agentos/cloud-deployment/{Security,TenantIngestionModel,Configuration}.md`.
